mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, driving negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >60% of instances following a 0.5pp unemployment rise over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative quarterly returns in >50% of occurrences over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and corporate earnings momentum, generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >65% of months where industrial production increases by more than 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with a stagnant or rising federal funds rate forces monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns exceed 55% of cases when inflation surpasses 2.5% and rates do not fall.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains aggregate income and corporate revenue expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >50% of months with positive payroll growth over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Sub-1% annualized real GDP growth indicates economic stagnation and weak corporate earnings prospects, triggering negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >60% of quarters where GDP growth falls below 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and employment signal robust supply-side capacity utilization and hiring momentum, generating positive short-term market returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months where both series rise simultaneously.
